currentState: Fast mutual respect built on pattern-reading. Havel recognizes immediately that Sylvanas is asking the right questions, and Sylvanas recognizes a local officer whose instincts are clean even when his framework is incomplete.
powerDynamic: Sylvanas controls the strike logic and the final call. Havel controls the district-level knowledge without which the strike would be blind.

physicalDynamics.pattern: They spend their time side by side over maps and in the street, both watching windows, lanes, and workers as if conversation is only the second thing happening.

nameUsage.sylvanasCallsHavel: Surname or function only, stripped to usefulness.
nameUsage.havelCallsSylvanas: Reads her as command almost immediately, dropping any resistance once grain becomes the named trouble.

history.event: Havel puts months of district mapping in Sylvanas's hands, and she converts it from frustrated suspicion into a same-night target package.

trajectory: Guarded first contact -> practical co-reading -> operational trust.
